summary: Completed comprehensive testing of BIG Hat Presenter trivia round creation tool. All 5 round types (MC, REG, MISC, MYS, BIG) working perfectly with full end-to-end functionality including CRUD operations, PowerPoint generation, and file management.
passed_tests: All backend API endpoints (17/17 tests passed - 100% success rate)
Dashboard loads with all 5 round type cards (MC, REG, MISC, MYS, BIG)
Navigation to all round type creators (/create/MC, /create/REG, etc.)
MC form with 10 questions, A/B/C/D options, and answer fields
MYS form with 9 questions + locked Q10 'Theme?' question
BIG form with single question, 10 answer lines, add/remove functionality, tiebreaker
Round name input with proper placeholders for each type
Save Draft functionality - creates rounds and returns to dashboard
Generate PPTX functionality - creates PowerPoint files and downloads
Recent Rounds section displays saved rounds with metadata
PPTX download buttons generate and download PowerPoint files
Delete buttons remove rounds from database and UI
End-to-end workflows: MC round creation, save, PPTX generation, deletion
End-to-end workflows: BIG round creation with tiebreaker and PPTX generation
Proper form validation and error handling
success_percentage: Backend: 100% (17/17 tests passed), Frontend: 100% (all UI components and integrations working)
